name: VeloRealWorldActionRequest
description: Durable governance for controlled real-world action requests in VELO

action_type.description: Type of real-world action (e.g., publish_content, send_email, client_message, job_application, browser_automation, connector_activation, credential_use, data_export_prepare, workflow_run, money_movement, trading_action, form_submission, platform_onboarding)

title.description: Short descriptive title of the action

explicit_user_request_summary.description: Summary of the user's explicit request

safety_validation_status.description: Safety Core validation status (pending | passed | blocked | needs_review)

permission_status.description: Admin permission status (pending | approved | denied | expired)

credential_scope_status.description: Credential scope status (not_required | required_missing | scoped_ready | blocked)

connector_status.description: Connector status (not_required | missing | read_only | write_ready | blocked)

execution_mode.description: Governance execution mode (staged_review | admin_approved_ready | provider_ready | blocked | completed)

value_limit_summary.description: Summary of value/financial limits for this action

black_box_log_id.description: ID of the corresponding black box log entry
